description: Add NOT NULL field validation to all controller INSERT operations - Batch 3 (remaining controllers: portal, AI, reporting, misc). Add validation checks at the top of each handler function that performs an INSERT, returning HTTP 400 with a descriptive error message listing which fields are required.
steps: Fix celebrations.controller.ts: createCelebration needs residentId, celebrationType, title, celebrationDate. addCelebrationTask needs celebrationId, title.
Fix competencyMatrix.controller.ts: createCompetency needs name, category. assignCompetency needs staffId, competencyId.
Fix competencySignoff.controller.ts: createSignoff needs staffId, competencyId, signoffType.
Fix elearning.controller.ts: createModule needs title, category, contentType. createQuiz needs moduleId, title, questions, passMarkPct. recordCompletion needs moduleId, staffId.
Fix familyPortal.controller.ts: generateDailySummary needs residentId. uploadFamilyPhoto needs caption validation only if present. generateWeeklyReport - internal automation, less critical.
Fix friendshipMapper.controller.ts: logObservation needs residentId, observedWith, interactionType.
Fix intergenerational.controller.ts: createProgramme needs name, partnerOrganisation. createVisit needs programmeId, visitDate. addParticipant needs visitId, residentId.
Fix invoicing.controller.ts: createRateUplift needs residentId, previousRatePence, newRatePence, effectiveDate. sendPaymentReminder needs invoiceId, reminderType.
Fix menuChoice.controller.ts: createMenuOption needs mealType, name. createDietaryProfile needs residentId. recordMenuChoice needs residentId, menuOptionId, mealDate, mealType.
Fix moodEnvironment.controller.ts: logIntervention needs residentId, interventionId.
Fix musicTherapy.controller.ts: createPreference needs residentId, genreId. startSession needs residentId.
Fix photoFrame.controller.ts: uploadPhoto needs residentId, photoUrl. logViewing needs photoId, residentId.
Fix purposePlanner.controller.ts: createRole needs name. createAssignment needs residentId, roleId. logEngagement needs assignmentId, residentId.
Fix qrRoom.controller.ts: createQrCode needs residentId, roomNumber.
Fix regulatoryReporting.controller.ts: already has validation for type - also needs formData validation.
Fix rehabGoals.controller.ts: createGoal needs residentId, title. addMilestone needs goalId, title. logProgress needs goalId, residentId, progressNotes.
Fix reportBuilder.controller.ts: createTemplate needs name, dataSource. runReport needs templateId.
Fix residentTablet.controller.ts: createRequest needs residentId, requestType.
Fix offlineSync.controller.ts: queueAction needs entityType, action, payload.
Fix boardPack.controller.ts: generateBoardPack needs reportMonth.
Fix smartHandover.controller.ts: generateHandover - internal, but recordAction needs handoverId, itemIndex, actionTaken.
Fix staffPerformance.controller.ts: recordMetrics needs appropriate fields.
Fix environmentalIntel.controller.ts: already has zone validation - SKIP if sufficient.
Fix residents.controller.ts: createResident needs firstName, lastName, dateOfBirth, roomNumber.
Fix tasks.controller.ts: bulk insert has conditional logic - add validation for name in template creation.
acceptance_criteria: All controllers in backend/src/controllers/ that perform INSERT operations now validate required fields before executing the query
Each validation returns HTTP 400 with a JSON body containing an error field that lists the missing required fields
No existing validation is removed or weakened
Running npm run build in backend/ succeeds with no TypeScript errors
